title: Orléans, Centre-Val de Loire — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Orléans, Centre-Val de Loire: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Orléans is a city in Centre-Val de Loire with a population of 116,000. The city of Joan of Arc on the Loire River, with a rich medieval history and a strategic location south of Paris.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
